channel.title: Araucania on Kimün-Ko
channel.description: Recent content in Araucania on Kimün-Ko

item.title: Atmospheric river over southern Chile: why the 6-9 July storm caused so much damage
item.description: Between Monday 6 and Thursday 9 July 2026, a frontal system strengthened by a category 3-4 atmospheric river delivered intense rainfall across La Araucanía, Los Ríos and Los Lagos ² ³ . The combination of abundant Pacific moisture, strong winds and a freezing level above 3,000 m substantially increased the hydrological hazard ⁴ .
